title: Complex pipeline — full openEO 1.3.0 spec-strict S2 NDVI mean-time with SCL cloud mask
description: 200×200 px AOI (~2×2 km at S2 10m native res) over Wien, JJAS 2024. Exercises: load_collection (with eo:cloud_cover<30 filter and explicit bands list) → mask_scl_dilation (SCL class-set mask: shadow/cloud/snow → NA, applied to B04 and B08) → ndvi (pure per-pixel using B04 red, B08 nir, target_band='ndvi') → reduce_dimension(t, mean) → save_result(GTiff). NOTE: Uses mask_scl_dilation (NOT generic mask) because the openEO `mask(data, mask)` process expects a binary truthy mask cube; raw SCL has non-zero clear-sky values that would falsely mask everything. A future atom (mask_from_values or apply callback evaluator) could compose generic mask via load_collection → filter_bands(SCL) → apply(eq+or) → binary cube → mask.
